title: Pennsic Mapper
description: Browse the Pennsic 53 (2026) camp map and build a shareable personal map of coloured, labelled pins, reached by a link.

dataSources.name: Pennsic camp layout (schematic, original art)
dataSources.description: The base map is an original, hand-authored parchment-style schematic evoking the publicly documented general layout of the Pennsic War site (lake, battlefield, merchants'/A&S row, lettered entrance gates, kingdom-camping rings). These are non-copyrightable layout facts, not a trace of any specific copyrighted cartography — no third-party map image or data file is bundled or fetched.
